chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ مَمْلُوكَ غَيْرِهِ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – The free man kills a slave of someone else, or injures him, and the slave kills the free or injures him

text: قَالَ يُقْتَلُ الْعَبْدُ بِالْحُرِّ وَ لَا يُقْتَلُ الْحُرُّ بِالْعَبْدِ وَ لَكِنْ يُغَرَّمُ ثَمَنَهُ وَ يُضْرَبُ ضَرْباً شَدِيداً حَتَّى لَا يَعُودَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Slave would be killed due to the free, and the free would not be killed due to the slave, but he would be fined his value, and he would be whipped with an intense whipping until he does not repeat’.
